title: Antenatal routine review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

source.title: Antenatal Care Standard
source.population: Pregnant women and adolescent girls receiving pre-conception or antenatal care.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare providers delivering antenatal care in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for routine antenatal documentation in Abu Dhabi; partial for high-risk or complication-specific care and for use outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: 1. Standard Scope and Purpose; 3.4 Antenatal Care; 3.4.1 Routine Antenatal Care

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

assessment.text: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.
assessment.rationale: Relevant only with gestation and actual assessed findings.

source.title: Antenatal Care Standard
source.population: Pregnant women and adolescent girls receiving pre-conception or antenatal care.

source.exclusions: Direct for routine antenatal documentation in Abu Dhabi; partial for high-risk or complication-specific care and for use outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: Appendix 1 — Routine Antenatal Screening and Care

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.

assessment.text: Defines conditions that require additional obstetric review and preserves escalation as a clinician decision rather than an automatic workflow output.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to clinician-assessed risk without automated classification.

curation_policy: Direct full-source guideline reconstruction; every legacy item has an auditable comparison and every final clinical item retains exact source provenance.
